# Processed Data Directory

This directory stores the **final feature-engineered** and scaled data
ready for model training.

## Expected Files (auto-generated by notebook)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `X_train.csv` | Training features (scaled, encoded) |
| `X_test.csv`  | Test features (scaled, encoded) |
| `y_train.csv` | Training labels (encoded) |
| `y_test.csv`  | Test labels (encoded) |
| `features.csv`| Full processed feature matrix (before split) |

## Feature Columns

After processing, the feature matrix contains these columns:

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `payload_len` | float | Character count (z-score scaled) |
| `payload_entropy` | float | Shannon entropy (z-score scaled) |
| `special_char_cnt` | float | Special character count (z-score scaled) |
| `digit_ratio` | float | Fraction of digits (z-score scaled) |
| `upper_ratio` | float | Fraction of uppercase letters (z-score scaled) |
| `kw_sql` | int | SQL keyword binary flag |
| `kw_xss` | int | XSS keyword binary flag |
| `ID` | float | Encoded sample ID (z-score scaled) |

## Notes

- Excluded from Git; re-generate by running `notebooks/01_eda.ipynb`.
- Target encoding: `1→XSS`, `2→SQLi`, `3→Normal` (then LabelEncoder 0-indexed).
